params.prompt: Use the attached reference image to create a realistic human founder portrait in the program graphic. Keep likeness, hairstyle, warm smile, light gray blazer and black shirt. Premium 4:5 Limitless Club PROGRAM GRAPHIC. Place founder on left third, text on right with clean hierarchy. Dark Midnight Luxe Editorial style: matte black, graphite, silver-white text, tiny electric blue accents, luxury founder-media feel. Required text: LIMITLESS CLUB; HERMES AGENT; Multi-Agent AI Masterclass; Build the team that never sleeps.; คอร์สที่จะเปลี่ยน AI ให้เป็น “ทีมงาน” ของคุณ; Chief of Staff Agent; Content Agent; Vibe Coding Agent; สร้างทีม AI Agent ที่ทำงาน 24/7; By Jedi Trinupab · @jeditrinupab. Make it feel human, premium, calm, high-trust. Do not make the face plastic or robotic. Safe margins, no clutter, no misspelled duplicate text.
